//: Everything in js/ is browser ES module code, loaded via <script type="module">. The root package.json declares "type": "commonjs" (for postcss.config.js/tailwind.config.js), which would otherwise make Node parse these files as CommonJS and refuse to import their named exports from a test. Browsers ignore this file entirely - it exists so `node --test` can import js/ modules directly, as tests/stripe-credentials-save.test.mjs does. Do not add dependencies or scripts here.
